rationale: The proposed change to the homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §22.0512, which governs educator immunity from disciplinary proceedings for use of physical force against students.
quote: Sec. 22.0512. IMMUNITY FROM DISCIPLINARY PROCEEDINGS FOR PROFESSIONAL EMPLOYEES.
_note: No overlap between proposed tax homestead exemption increase and educator disciplinary immunity statute.
